title: Sim Seven
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sim Seven''' was a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] simulator located in [[Delta Sector]] of the original [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].
